subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enraptured by the breezes of the Holy Spirit! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast rejoiced at the appearance of the signs of God and hast been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انجذب بنفحات روح القدس طوبی لک بما استبشرت بظهور ایات الله و استضئت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
